indhaare indhaare en indhayam indhaare

indhaare indhaare en indhayam indhaare

idhu maaraadhey
Injathae injathae en kadhal injathae

Yekkama yekkama en naavil aalama
vandhadhai maatrinai vaanavil desama
naavil nanjudan paambai oorinen
kaadhal vandhadhum pasum kaambai maarinen
en uyirellam veliyetrinen
unai uyirena alli ootrinen

en dhegam minnuthe, neeye kandari
nee thirunthiye vazhndha podhum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Injathae?

The song Injathae revolves around themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of romantic yearning.

Who are the singers of Injathae?

The song is beautifully sung by Madhusree, Roopkumar Rathod, and Yazin.

What role does the song play in the movie Nedunchalai?

In the movie Nedunchalai, the song underscores a pivotal moment of emotional connection between the characters.

Who composed the music for Injathae?

The music for Injathae was composed by Sathya C.

When was the movie Nedunchalai released?

The movie Nedunchalai was released in the year 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Injathae from the movie Nedunchalai is a poignant melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by Madhusree, Roopkumar Rathod, and Yazin, it beautifully conveys the emotions of romantic yearning and connection. The lyrics by Mani Amuthavan, combined with Sathya C's soothing music, create a heartfelt experience. This song plays a significant role in the film, highlighting the emotional bond between the characters.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soulful melody of Injathae from the movie Nedunchalai, where the harmonious voices of Madhusree, Roopkumar Rathod, and Yazin blend beautifully. With lyrics by Mani Amuthavan and music by Sathya C, this song captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into a world of emotions with this captivating track.
stanzaMeanings: Don't lose, don't lose, my love, don't lose. Don't break, don't break, my heart, don't break.
Cuddling and loving, this affection will not change. Don't lose, don't lose, my love, don't lose.

Restless, restless, my tongue spoke deeply and changed. I transformed into a colorful world, with poison in my mouth like a snake. When love came, I became a green branch. I let all my life out and gave you my life.
Don't lose, don't lose, my love, don't lose.

With desire, with desire, I come close. I fade away in the distant sound, in the wind. When I wish, I sleep with dreams. My body sparkles, you are the light. You changed and lived, even the thief will change today.
Don't lose, don't lose, my love, don't lose.
In the red sea, honey is taken, it becomes a red hill and joins together, bringing happiness, bringing happiness.
